title: Associate Manager Group Strategy (m/w/d)
required_skills: Excellent Master/MBA/Doctoral degree in engineering or business economics
Initial professional experience preferably in high-ranking strategy consultancy, investment bank or comparable group function
Strategy and analysis methodology competence; AI-assisted research tools proficiency
Analytical thinking, structured approach, high quality standards, initiative
Stakeholder management across all levels; ability to prepare results for top management
bonus_skills: Strong affinity for technical products and markets
Experience in M&A analysis (initial assessment of acquisition candidates)
Collaborative team approach and trust-building relationship style
matched_skills: Competitive and market analysis (ECE Group: automotive and furniture retail competitive analysis, market sizing)
Executive-ready reporting and board-level preparation (HSBC: C-suite data storytelling, VfB Stuttgart: board presentations)
Project management and structured analysis (HSBC: 6-workstream programme, budget dashboards)
Stakeholder coordination at multiple levels (HSBC executive reviews, ECE Group cross-team meetings)
Workshop preparation and documentation (VfB Stuttgart: KPI framework, post-event evaluation reports)
KPI framework design (VfB Stuttgart: sustainability impact measurement)
missing_skills: Top-tier strategy consultancy or investment banking background
M&A analysis and acquisition candidate assessment experience
Capital market and supervisory board material preparation
Technical product/market affinity (automotive braking systems, rail, industrial)
Secondary source database research (Bloomberg, Capital IQ, etc.)
core_responsibilities: Participate in strategic programmes and projects on behalf of board and management
Independently conduct market, competitive and trend analyses as input for decision documents
Continuously maintain strategic situation map (competitor profiles, technology radar, market data)
Process clearly defined work packages in strategy projects with agreed deliverables and milestones
Prepare and follow up workshops and stakeholder interviews with structured documentation
Coordinate with internal contacts (Finance, Controlling, Business Units) and steer project activities
Contribute to board presentations and executive briefings under leadership guidance
recommended_emphasis: ECE Group: Competitive analysis and market sizing for automotive retail segment — directly relevant to Knorr-Bremse's technical market monitoring need
HSBC: Data storytelling translating complex programme data into structured executive narratives — maps to board presentation and decision document preparation
VfB Stuttgart: KPI framework design and structured post-event evaluation — evidences strategy methodology and analytics capability
AI tools (ChatGPT/Claude) proficiency — explicitly valued for AI-assisted research workflows
summary: Boru scores 45.5 (weak match) with transferable analytical and executive communication strengths, but the role's preference for strategy consultancy or investment banking pedigree represents a gap. The competitive analysis and KPI framework work at ECE Group and VfB Stuttgart are the strongest levers. The technical product affinity and M&A analysis experience are missing. This is a reach application that requires positioning the strategy coursework (Master Management & Entrepreneurship at Leuphana) and analytical project work prominently, while acknowledging the consulting background gap.
